Build Your Dream Home With Confidence

From kitchen remodels to whole-home renovations, Summit Pro Builders delivers expert craftsmanship, transparent pricing, and on-time results for Denver-area homeowners.

Why Denver Homeowners Choose Us

We combine decades of local experience with modern building techniques to deliver renovations that last.

Licensed & Insured

Fully licensed Colorado general contractor with comprehensive liability and workers' comp insurance. Your home and investment are protected.

Quality Craftsmanship

We use premium materials and proven techniques backed by manufacturer warranties. Every project is built to the highest standards.

Transparent Pricing

Detailed line-item estimates with no hidden fees. You'll know exactly what you're paying for before we start any work.

About Summit Pro Builders

Built on Trust, Delivered With Pride

Since 2009, we've been transforming homes across the Denver metro area. What started as a two-person crew has grown into a full-service general contracting firm with a dedicated team of craftsmen, project managers, and designers.

Every project begins with listening. We take time to understand your vision, your budget, and your timeline, then build a plan that brings it all together.

Learn more about our story

What Our Clients Say

Real stories from Denver homeowners we've worked with.

"Summit Pro completely transformed our 1970s kitchen. They managed everything from permits to the final walkthrough. Came in on budget and two days early. Couldn't be happier."

JM

Jennifer Martinez

Kitchen Remodel, Highlands Ranch

"We added a 400 sq ft family room and it blends perfectly with the existing house. The team was professional, clean, and communicated every step of the way."

DT

David Thompson

Home Addition, Lakewood

"Our master bathroom went from dated to spa-quality. The tile work is stunning and the heated floors were worth every penny. Summit Pro is our go-to contractor now."

SR

Sarah Richardson

Bathroom Renovation, Boulder

Ready to Start Your Renovation?

Get a free, no-obligation estimate. We'll visit your home, discuss your vision, and provide a detailed quote within 48 hours.

Get Your Free Estimate Call (720) 555-0193

Denver's trusted general contractor for kitchen remodels, bathroom renovations, home additions, and whole-home renovations. Licensed, insured, and committed to quality craftsmanship.
